text:
Hi
I've just installed an 'rsyslog' on a freebsd 10.1. With the 'security' filter i can't receive the IPFW logs. It works with the natif 'syslog' and with 'syslog-ng'.
I can't find any information about that problem on any forums, you may be have anything about this...
Thanks (sorry for my english)
Sebastien
